name: Fund Folio
description: Free, client-side mutual fund scoring and tax-aware exit planner for Indian investors.
audience: Indian mutual fund investors (resident, NRI, HNI)
privacy: All processing is client-side. No portfolio data is sent to any server.

url_param_fields: demo (1 = load synthetic demo portfolio and score it)
spousal (1 = enable spousal LTCG exemption, doubling combined exemption)
ltcg (numeric LTCG rate as percent, default 12.5)
exemption (numeric LTCG exemption in rupees, default 125000)

capabilities: verdict_fund: HOLD-STRONG | HOLD | OBSERVE | TRIM | EXIT-LOSS | EXIT-MICRO | EXIT-UNDERPERF
plan_tax_phased_exits: distribute EXIT verdicts across FY26-27, FY27-28, FY28-29

verdict_thresholds.EXIT-UNDERPERF: held > 365 days AND annualised return < 0.7 * category target
verdict_thresholds.OBSERVE: thematic and held < 365 days, OR mild underperformance
verdict_thresholds.HOLD-STRONG: alpha > 3% AND position size < 15% of book
verdict_thresholds.HOLD: alpha >= 0 and no other rule fires
